hero.title: Improve image quality and compare the result
hero.description: Upload an image, improve its visual quality automatically and compare it in real time with an interactive slider. Adjust sharpness, contrast, saturation, clarity, noise reduction and upscaling.
hero.feature1: Automatic enhancement directly in your browser
hero.feature3: Download the enhanced image or the comparison

upload.title: 1. Upload image
upload.help: Supported formats: PNG, JPG and WebP.

actions.title: 4. Export
actions.note: The comparison download creates an image with Before and After labels.

preview.title: Preview
preview.empty: Upload an image to start enhancing it.
preview.placeholder: The before/after comparison will appear here.

messages.imageLoaded: Image loaded. You can now enhance it automatically or adjust the controls.
messages.ready: Image enhanced. You can keep refining the controls.
messages.uploadError: The image could not be loaded.
messages.processError: The image could not be processed.
